title: Miners
body:
## **A mod about Mining and more.**

This mod adds 2 new ores, 1 new dimension and much much more.

**The Ores added are Titanium and Grim Dust**,
with Titanium being found in the Overworld,
while Grim Dust being found in the new dimension.

The new Dimension is being called **'Mining'**.
In the 'Mining', there are many things like Stone Wood, Liquid Stone Oceans and Special Mining Dimension exclusive stone that can be mined to get any valuable ore resource.


<details>
<summary>Modpack Use</summary>

_I allow this mod to be used in any modpack._

</details>
